dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses price_pos_20 (price position relative to 20-period range) as proxy for '20-period trend confirmation'. Returns (rate of change) used for momentum assessment over 5-bar lookback. Entry logic requires all three conditions (trend confirmation + MA alignment + positive momentum). Exit triggered if either MA is crossed or momentum reverses. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both uptrends and downtrends.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses price_pos_20 (price position relative to 20-period range) as proxy for '20-period trend confirmation'. Returns (rate of change) used for momentum assessment over 5-bar lookback. Entry logic requires all three conditions (trend confirmation + MA alignment + positive momentum). Exit triggered if either MA is crossed or momentum reverses. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both uptrends and downtrends.

source_rule_text: A trader should use price action as an inferred signal of private information held by other market participants, because gradual price incorporation of information creates exploitable trends for momentum strategies.
